name: Dr. Fatih Birol
title: Executive Director, International Energy Agency
session_title: Geopolitics of LPG: Supply Security in 2026
session_description: Opening plenary examining geopolitical forces shaping LPG supply chains and what they mean for producers, traders, and distributors globally.
pre_submitted_questions: How should distributors prepare for supply disruptions in 2026?
Is LPG at risk of exclusion from EU green finance taxonomy?
What role can LPG play as a bridge fuel in Sub-Saharan Africa?

name: James Rockall
title: CEO & Managing Director, World Liquid Gas Association
session_title: Geopolitics of LPG: Supply Security in 2026
session_description: Opening plenary with WLGA perspective on supply security and the Association's Risk Framework.
pre_submitted_questions: What is WLGA's Supply Security Risk Framework?
How can industry collaborate on storage and logistics resilience?

name: Sarah Mitchell
title: CEO, SHV Energy
session_title: BioLPG & Renewable LPG: The Road to Net Zero
session_description: Scaling BioLPG and rLPG, certification, and the path to net zero for distribution.
pre_submitted_questions: What are the main barriers to scaling BioLPG production?
How do we ensure BioLPG is recognised in EU sustainability regulations?

name: Pierre Dubois
title: Head of LPG, TotalEnergies
session_title: BioLPG & Renewable LPG: The Road to Net Zero
session_description: TotalEnergies' production and certification efforts for renewable LPG.
pre_submitted_questions: What is the cost premium for BioLPG today?
Which certification schemes should distributors prioritise?

name: Rebecca Foster
title: Investment Director, African Development Bank
session_title: Clean Cooking: Achieving Universal LPG Access by 2030
session_description: AfDB's commitment to finance clean cooking and LPG distribution across Africa.
pre_submitted_questions: What financing instruments does AfDB offer for LPG in West Africa?
How can governments and industry work together to subsidise LPG for the poorest?

name: Raj Patel
title: Managing Director, Indian Oil Corporation
session_title: Clean Cooking: Achieving Universal LPG Access by 2030
session_description: Lessons from India's PMUY and applicability in Africa and Asia.
pre_submitted_questions: What lessons from India's PMUY can be applied in Africa?
How do we address the cylinder deposit barrier in low-income markets?

name: Andreas Mueller
title: CTO, Westfalen Group
session_title: Digital Transformation in the LPG Industry
session_description: IoT, smart valves, and digital tools for cylinder and tank management.
pre_submitted_questions: What are the main use cases for IoT in LPG cylinder management?
What data standards are needed for interoperability?

name: Jean-Pierre Dupont
title: Head of Cylinders, Hexagon Ragasco
session_description: Composite cylinder standards, testing, and global harmonisation.
pre_submitted_questions: How can composite cylinders be approved across multiple jurisdictions?
What are the key differences between ISO and regional LPG cylinder standards?
